site_label: Arabian Peninsula and Levant dromedary context
exact_source_text: The remains of a single large-sized Late Pleistocene camel individual recovered from the Site 1040 near Wadi Halfa were first evaluated by Gautier.
chronology_text: Historical and archaeological dromedary range context
interpretation_note: The paper names an exact Wadi Halfa specimen, but the current repository still publishes camel only as broad non-Nordic context rather than a precise atlas-grade point.
support_gap_note: The shipped point is still a broad contextual centroid even though the paper names Site 1040 near Wadi Halfa.
